allow: PowerShell(php -r "require 'vendor/autoload.php'; $app = require_once 'bootstrap/app.php'; $app->make\('Illuminate\\Contracts\\Console\\Kernel'\)->bootstrap\(\); $record = App\\Models\\PengaturanCms::first\(\); if \($record\) { echo 'ID: ' . $record->id . PHP_EOL; echo 'Key: ' . $record->key . PHP_EOL; echo 'Value: ' . substr\($record->value, 0, 100\) . PHP_EOL; } else { echo 'No records found'; }")

PowerShell(php artisan tinker --execute="$record = App\\Models\\PengaturanCms::first\(\); if \($record\) { echo 'ID: ' . $record->id . PHP_EOL . 'Key: ' . $record->key . PHP_EOL . 'Value: ' . substr\($record->value ?? '', 0, 100\) . PHP_EOL; } else { echo 'No records found'; }")
